description: Address all 5 issues from the semantic review: fix relative OG URLs, add explicit publication dates to blog posts, fix scripts/update_sitemap.ts to import CANONICAL_DOMAIN, fix redirect page OG URL, and fix misleading JSDoc comment.
steps: 1. Fix 7 relative OG URLs to use absolute URLs with CANONICAL_DOMAIN: app/in/fd-calculator, app/in/emi-calculator, app/in/ppf-calculator, app/in/salary-calculator, app/in/sip-calculator, app/calculators, app/tools/budget-analyzer
2. Add explicit publication dates (Jan 2025 timeframe) to the 8 editorial blog posts that call getArticleSchema()
3. Fix scripts/update_sitemap.ts to emit code that imports CANONICAL_DOMAIN instead of hardcoding
4. Fix app/in/home-loan-calculator/page.tsx OG URL to point at canonical target or remove OG tags
5. Fix JSDoc comment in components/seo/CalculatorSchemaInjector.tsx to not say head section
acceptance_criteria: No relative OG URLs remain in any page
All 8 blog posts pass explicit datePublished to getArticleSchema()
scripts/update_sitemap.ts emits code that imports CANONICAL_DOMAIN
app/in/home-loan-calculator/page.tsx OG URL matches canonical target
CalculatorSchemaInjector JSDoc does not say head section
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/cost-smart && npx next build -- should succeed
Run: grep -rn "url: '/" app/ --include='*.tsx' -- should find no relative OG URLs
findings: All 5 review issues fixed. Build passes. 7 relative OG URLs converted to absolute with CANONICAL_DOMAIN. 8 blog posts now have explicit datePublished values in Jan 2025 timeframe. scripts/update_sitemap.ts now emits import of CANONICAL_DOMAIN. Redirect page OG URL now points to canonical target /home-loan-calculator. CalculatorSchemaInjector JSDoc no longer mentions head section.
